visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and red lipstick, wearing a beige top with large ruffled sleeve cuffs, smiles broadly and speaks directly to the camera. She is initially seated in a train carriage with blue-patterned seat covers, then in the front seat of a car. The lighting is bright and natural, coming from the windows. She appears extremely joyful and animated. (2) The scene shifts to close-up shots of bowls of Taiwanese chicken rice (shredded meat over rice) and fried eggs. The woman is seen eating with a metal spoon in a brightly lit local restaurant. Later, she walks outside on a paved street, holding hands with a man whose arm and hand are visible. They visit a cafe where two elaborate ice cream sundaes and coffee drinks are served on a silver tray. (3) In an indoor setting with traditional Japanese-style wooden sliding doors, the woman peeks through a gap, laughing and covering her mouth. She enters a room where a tiny chocolate cake with 'Happy Birthday' candles sits on a low wooden table. A man in a white t-shirt is seated nearby. The woman waves and blows out the candles with an expression of pure delight. (4) The woman is presented with a white envelope and a white gift box tied with a 'DIOR' ribbon. Her hands reach for the gifts with high energy. She opens the package to reveal a bright red quilted leather wallet with gold charms. She holds the wallet close to her face, posing and speaking enthusiastically to the camera. The video concludes with final shots of more chicken rice being eaten.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: POV. [Slogan]: 🇰🇷韓國女友說生日只要雞肉飯. [Subtitle]: 生日紀念跟男朋友一起去嘉義小旅行🇹🇼. (2) [Variety]: 雞肉飯. (3) [Subtitle]: 一到嘉義立馬先衝火雞肉飯🍚. (4) [Subtitle]: 荷包蛋必備. [Variety]: (蛋黃流下來🤤). (5) [Subtitle]: 我真的可以一天三餐都吃火雞肉飯. [Subtitle]: 拜託封我一個榮譽嘉義人(?)😂. (6) [Subtitle]: 結果這次才知道. (7) [Subtitle]: 原來在台灣29歲生日不能隨便慶祝. [Subtitle]: 因為是「逢九」對嗎？. (8) [Subtitle]: 自己小小鬱卒…又跑去外帶火雞肉飯. [Variety]: (其實只是我自己想吃). (9) [Subtitle]: 已經在想明天要去吃哪家火雞肉飯了😋. (10) [Subtitle]: 飯吃完之後男朋友叫我先待在房間裡…. [Variety]: (偷看). [Variety]: 😂😂😂. (11) [Subtitle]: 一個超小的蛋糕. [Variety]: ❓. [Variety]: 😂😂😂. (12) [Subtitle]: 還準備蠟燭而且蠟燭比蛋糕還大🤣. [Variety]: 😂😂😂. (13) [Subtitle]: 兩個都在爆笑XDDDD. [Variety]: (還是很開心😍). (14) [Variety]: 🧔‍♂️男友：其實還有禮物啦. [Subtitle]: 有嗎?!!!!. [Subtitle]: 等我一下x2. (15) [Logo]: DIOR. [Subtitle]: 一封信💌. (16) [Logo]: DIOR. [Subtitle]: 尖叫分貝直接飆高. [Variety]: ㄉㄆㄇㄈ. (17) [Subtitle]: 信等一下再來看好了. [Variety]: (反應系女孩認證😂). (18) [Subtitle]: 什麼呀!!!. [Logo]: DIOR. (19) [Subtitle]: 實際看真的超美的紅色❤️. (20) [Subtitle]: 算命老師跟我說我用紅色的東西真的更好. [Subtitle]: 謝謝 歐巴🥰. (21) [Subtitle]: 隔天又去吃火雞肉飯. [Subtitle]: 好幸福的生日週🥰.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator and 1 male companion appearing in reflections, hands, or partial shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight dark hair, bright red lipstick, wearing a beige long-sleeved shirt with flared ruffled cuffs.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Features various locations including a high-speed rail carriage with blue seats, local Taiwanese eateries with simple tables, a sunlit urban street, a modern cafe with wooden furniture, and a hotel room with traditional Japanese sliding doors.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a high-tempo, upbeat electronic pop track characterized by a steady four-on-the-floor beat and bright synthesizer layers. A female voice speaks with high pitch and fast tempo, conveying extreme excitement and positive arousal. (2) A transition whoosh SFX occurs as the scene shifts. The sound of a metal spoon clinking against ceramic is heard clearly as the female narrator continues her energetic speech. Faint outdoor city hum is briefly present but low in intensity. (3) A mechanical sliding sound indicates a door opening. A male voice is heard briefly with a lower, friendly pitch, followed by a loud, dual-vocal burst of laughter. The music remains a consistent energetic background. (4) A sharp, high-pitched scream of delight from the female marks the unboxing phase, showing a peak in intensity. The rustling of paper and the soft thud of a box being handled are clearly audible against the persistent, cheerful BGM. The overall mix is clean with high vocal clarity.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document a birthday celebration trip, showcasing the protagonist's love for local food and the emotional climax of receiving a luxury surprise gift.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While a Dior product is shown prominently as a gift, there are no explicit promotional codes or paid sponsorship indicators.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media editing styles with high text density and upbeat BGM to maintain high engagement.
